debug_info.goal:
u : Scalar52
h : u ≠ ZERO
⊢ ∃ m, u.as_montgomery = ok m ∧ Scalar52_as_Nat m ≡ Scalar52_as_Nat u * R [MOD L] ∧ m ≠ ZERO

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
have h₁ : as_montgomery u = ok (u as_montgomery) := rfl
  have h₂ : Scalar52_as_Nat (u as_montgomery) ≡ (Scalar52_as_Nat u * R) [MOD L] := by
    have h₃ : (Scalar52_as_Nat (u as_montgomery) : ℕ) ≡ (Scalar52_as_Nat u * R : ℕ) [MOD L] := by
      have h₄ : (Scalar52_as_Nat (u as_montgomery) : ℕ) ≡ (Scalar52_as_Nat u * R : ℕ) [MOD L] := by
        -- Prove that the Montgomery form of u is congruent to u * R modulo L
        have h₅ : (Scalar52_as_Nat (u as_montgomery) : ℕ) ≡ (Scalar52_as_Nat u * R : ℕ) [MOD L] := by
          -- Use the properties of modular arithmetic and the definition of Montgomery form
          have h₆ : (Scalar52_as_Nat (u as_montgomery) : ℕ) % L = (Scalar52_as_Nat u * R : ℕ) % L := by
            -- Calculate the Montgomery form modulo L
            have h₇ : (Scalar52_as_Nat (u as_montgomery) : ℕ) % L = ((Scalar52_as_Nat u * R : ℕ) % L) := by
              rfl
            exact h₇
          -- Use the fact that congruence is equivalent to the same modulo
          rw [Nat.ModEq]
          <;> simp [h₆]
        exact h₅
      exact h₄
    exact h₃
  have h₃ : (u as_montgomery) ≠ ZERO := by
    intro h₄
    -- If the Montgomery form was zero, then u would be zero, contradicting h
    have h₅ : u = ZERO := by
      simp_all [Scalar52.ext_iff]
      <;>
      (try decide) <;>
      (try {
        simp_all [Scalar52, as_montgomery]
        <;>
        norm_num at *
        <;>
        (try omega)
        <;>
        (try {
          aesop
        })
      }) <;>
      (try {
        simp_all [Scalar52, as_montgomery]
        <;>
        norm_num at *
        <;>
        (try omega)
        <;>
        (try {
          aesop
        })
      })
    contradiction
  refine' ⟨u as_montgomery, h₁, h₂, _⟩
  -- Prove that the Montgomery form is not zero
  <;> simp_all [Scalar52.ext_iff]
  <;>
  (try decide) <;>
  (try {
    simp_all [Scalar52, as_montgomery]
    <;>
    norm_num at *
    <;>
    (try omega)
    <;>
    (try {
      aesop
    })
  }) <;>
  (try {
    simp_all [Scalar52, as_montgomery]
    <;>
    norm_num at *
    <;>
    (try omega)
    <;>
    (try {
      aesop
    })
  })
